summary: Business Conduct and Ethics and other policies of the Company as in effect from time to time. 1 4. Compensation and Benefits. (a) Base Salary. Commencing as of the Effective Date and during the Employment Period, the Company shall pay to the Executive a base salary at the rate of four hundred and fifty thousand dollars ($450,000) per calendar year (the Base Salary), less applicable deductions, and prorated for any partial month or year, as applicable.
